deduplicated_results.name: Taking Additional Steps With Respect to the Situation in the Western Balkans
deduplicated_results.explanation: Amends and extends Western Balkans sanctions program. Maersk must screen against SDNs designated under this EO, but direct operational impact is limited unless Maersk has exposure to the Western Balkans or listed parties.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Expands authorities to block property and restrict entry of persons destabilizing the Western Balkans. Requires screening for new SDNs and compliance with OFAC list updates.

deduplicated_results.name: Taking Additional Steps With Respect to the Russian Federation's Harmful Activities
deduplicated_results.explanation: Directly amends and expands Russia-related sanctions. Maersk must promptly integrate new SDNs, sectoral restrictions, and service prohibitions into screening, workflows, and training.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Expands blocking, investment, and service prohibitions related to Russia. Requires screening for new SDNs, sectoral sanctions, and compliance with updated OFAC directives.

deduplicated_results.name: Prohibiting New Investment in and Certain Services to the Russian Federation in Response to Continued Russian Federation Aggression
deduplicated_results.explanation: Prohibits new investment and certain services to Russia. Maersk must ensure screening, workflows, and training reflect these prohibitions and any new SDNs.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Bans new investment and certain services to Russia. Requires screening for compliance with new prohibitions and SDN updates.

deduplicated_results.name: Prohibiting Certain Imports, Exports, and New Investment With Respect to Continued Russian Federation Aggression
deduplicated_results.explanation: Prohibits certain imports, exports, and investments with Russia. Maersk must integrate these prohibitions into screening and operational controls.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Bans import/export of certain Russian goods and new investment. Requires screening for compliance and updating workflows/training.

deduplicated_results.name: Prohibiting Certain Imports and New Investments With Respect to Continued Russian Federation Efforts To Undermine the Sovereignty and Territorial Integrity of Ukraine
deduplicated_results.explanation: Prohibits certain Russian imports and investments. Maersk must update screening and operational controls to comply with new prohibitions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Bans import of Russian oil, gas, and coal; prohibits new investment in Russian energy sector. Requires screening for compliance.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Sanctions on Foreign Persons Involved in the Global Illicit Drug Trade
deduplicated_results.explanation: Imposes sanctions on foreign persons involved in global illicit drug trade. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO, especially in logistics/shipping.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of persons involved in global illicit drug trade. Requires screening for new SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Sanctions on Certain Persons With Respect to the Humanitarian and Human Rights Crisis in Ethiopia
deduplicated_results.explanation: Imposes sanctions related to Ethiopia. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO, especially for logistics or shipping to/from Ethiopia.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of persons contributing to the crisis in Ethiopia. Requires screening for new SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property With Respect to Certain Russian Energy Export Pipelines
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property related to certain Russian energy export pipelines. Maersk must screen for SDNs and ensure no dealings with blocked entities or projects.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of persons involved in Russian energy export pipelines. Requires screening for new SDNs and compliance with sectoral restrictions.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property and Suspending Entry Into the United States of Certain Persons Contributing to the Destabilizing Situation in the Western Balkans
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property and suspends entry of persons destabilizing the Western Balkans. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and suspends entry of persons contributing to instability in the Western Balkans. Requires screening for new SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property With Respect to the Situation in Burma
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property with respect to Burma. Maersk must screen for SDNs and ensure no prohibited dealings, especially in logistics/shipping to/from Burma.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of persons involved in the Burma coup. Requires screening for new SDNs and compliance with OFAC list updates.

deduplicated_results.name: Designation of Certain Muslim Brotherhood Chapters as Foreign Terrorist Organizations and Specially Designated Global Terrorists
deduplicated_results.explanation: Designates certain Muslim Brotherhood chapters as FTOs and SDGTs. Maersk must screen for new SDNs and ensure no dealings with designated entities.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Designates certain Muslim Brotherhood chapters as FTOs/SDGTs. Requires screening for new SDNs and compliance with OFAC list updates.

deduplicated_results.name: Addressing Threats to the United States by the Government of the Russian Federation
deduplicated_results.explanation: EO 14329 addresses threats from the Russian government and likely establishes or expands US sanctions on Russia, directly impacting Maersk's OFAC screening, workflows, and training requirements.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Expands or modifies US sanctions on Russia, requiring Maersk to update screening systems, workflows, and training to ensure compliance with new or amended restrictions.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Sanctions on the International Criminal Court
deduplicated_results.explanation: EO 14203 imposes sanctions on the International Criminal Court. Maersk must ensure screening systems and workflows are updated to include ICC-related SDNs, as required by OFAC.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and restricts transactions with designated ICC officials/entities; Maersk must screen for these parties and update training and workflows accordingly.

deduplicated_results.name: Designation of Ansar Allah as a Foreign Terrorist Organization
deduplicated_results.explanation: Designates Ansar Allah (Houthis) as a Foreign Terrorist Organization, triggering OFAC sanctions and SDN list updates. Maersk must screen for these designations.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with Ansar Allah and associated entities; requires screening and prompt integration of new SDN entries.

deduplicated_results.name: Designating Cartels and Other Organizations as Foreign Terrorist Organizations and Specially Designated Global Terrorists
deduplicated_results.explanation: Designates cartels and other organizations as FTOs and SDGTs, amending EO 13224. Directly impacts OFAC SDN list and screening obligations.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Expands SDN list to include designated cartels and organizations; Maersk must update screening systems and training accordingly.

deduplicated_results.name: Addressing the Threat From Securities Investments That Finance Communist Chinese Military Companies
deduplicated_results.explanation: Prohibits US persons from investing in securities of designated Chinese military companies. Relevant for Maersk's capital markets compliance and screening of counterparties/investors.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Prohibits transactions in securities of designated Chinese military companies; requires screening for such entities in capital markets and supply chain.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons With Respect to the Conventional Arms Activities of Iran
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of persons involved in Iran's conventional arms activities. Directly relevant to OFAC screening, especially for shipping/logistics in high-risk regions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with designated persons/entities involved in Iran's arms activities; requires prompt SDN list integration and screening.

deduplicated_results.name: The President's Executive Order on Hong Kong Normalization
deduplicated_results.explanation: Removes Hong Kong's special status, extending China-related sanctions and export controls to Hong Kong. Maersk must update screening and export control workflows.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Applies China sanctions/export controls to Hong Kong; requires screening and compliance updates for Hong Kong-related transactions.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Sanctions With Respect to Additional Sectors of Iran
deduplicated_results.explanation: Imposes sanctions on additional sectors of Iran. Directly relevant to OFAC screening, especially for shipping/logistics and supply chain.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons operating in Iran's construction, mining, manufacturing, and textiles sectors; requires prompt SDN list integration and screening.

deduplicated_results.name: Administration of Proliferation Sanctions and Amendment of Executive Order 12851
deduplicated_results.explanation: Administers proliferation sanctions, amends EO 12851. Relevant for screening and export controls, especially for dual-use goods and proliferation risk.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Implements and administers proliferation-related sanctions; requires screening for proliferation risk and SDN list updates.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property and Suspending Entry of Certain Persons Contributing to the Situation in Mali
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of persons contributing to the situation in Mali. Relevant for screening parties in Mali or with Mali-related risk.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with designated persons/entities related to Mali; requires screening for Mali-related SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Sanctions With Respect to Iran
deduplicated_results.explanation: Imposes sanctions with respect to Iran, including blocking property and prohibiting transactions. Directly relevant to OFAC screening and list updates.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with designated Iranian persons/entities; requires prompt SDN list integration and screening.

deduplicated_results.name: Securing the Information and Communications Technology and Services Supply Chain
deduplicated_results.explanation: Secures ICT supply chain from foreign adversaries. Relevant for Maersk's technology procurement and vendor screening, but not a direct OFAC sanctions EO.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Authorizes blocking transactions involving ICTS from foreign adversaries; requires supply chain and vendor risk screening.

deduplicated_results.name: Taking Additional Steps to Address the National Emergency With Respect to Significant Transnational Criminal Organizations
deduplicated_results.explanation: Addresses transnational criminal organizations, amends EO 13581. Relevant for screening SDGTs and criminal organizations.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Expands sanctions on transnational criminal organizations; requires screening for SDGTs and related entities.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons Contributing to the Situation in Nicaragua
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of persons contributing to the situation in Nicaragua. Relevant for screening Nicaraguan parties and SDNs.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with designated Nicaraguan persons/entities; requires screening for Nicaragua-related SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Certain Sanctions in the Event of Foreign Interference in a United States Election
deduplicated_results.explanation: Imposes sanctions for foreign interference in US elections. Relevant for screening SDNs designated under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons/entities involved in foreign election interference; requires screening for such SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Allowing Additional Time for Recognizing Positive Actions by the Government of Sudan and Amending Executive Order 13761
deduplicated_results.explanation: Amends Sudan sanctions EO; relevant for screening Sudan-related parties and SDNs, but less direct than current Iran/Russia programs.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Extends review period for Sudan sanctions relief; requires continued screening for Sudan-related SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Recognizing Positive Actions by the Government of Sudan and Providing for the Revocation of Certain Sudan-Related Sanctions
deduplicated_results.explanation: EO 13761 revokes certain Sudan-related sanctions, impacting screening requirements for Sudan. Maersk must ensure its systems reflect the revocation and any subsequent changes, but the EO itself is a revocation, not an active sanctions program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Revokes EO 13067 and EO 13412, removing certain Sudan-related sanctions. Requires compliance teams to update screening lists and workflows to reflect the revocation.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property and Suspending Entry Into the United States of Persons Contributing to the Situation in Libya
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes blocking sanctions on persons contributing to the situation in Libya. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO and ensure workflows/training reflect Libya-related restrictions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and suspends entry of persons contributing to the Libya conflict. Requires screening for Libya SDNs and related entities.

deduplicated_results.name: Revocation of Executive Orders 13574, 13590, 13622, and 13645 With Respect to Iran, Amendment of Executive Order 13628 With Respect to Iran, and Provision of Implementation Authorities for Aspects of Certain Statutory Sanctions Outside the Scope of U.S. Commitments Under the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action of July 14, 2015
deduplicated_results.explanation: Revokes and amends several Iran-related EOs in light of the JCPOA. Maersk must ensure screening systems and workflows reflect the current status of Iran sanctions, including which authorities remain in force.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Revokes EOs 13574, 13590, 13622, 13645; amends EO 13628; implements statutory sanctions outside JCPOA scope. Requires updates to Iran-related screening and compliance processes.

deduplicated_results.name: Taking Additional Steps to Address the National Emergency With Respect to the Conflict in the Democratic Republic of the Congo
deduplicated_results.explanation: Amends EO 13413, expanding sanctions related to the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Expands blocking sanctions on persons contributing to the DRC conflict. Requires screening for DRC SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons Contributing to the Conflict in the Central African Republic
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of persons contributing to the conflict in the Central African Republic. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of persons contributing to CAR conflict. Requires screening for CAR SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Authorizing the Implementation of Certain Sanctions Set Forth in the Iran Threat Reduction and Syria Human Rights Act of 2012 and Additional Sanctions With Respect to Iran
deduplicated_results.explanation: Implements sanctions under the Iran Threat Reduction and Syria Human Rights Act and additional Iran sanctions. Maersk must ensure screening systems, workflows, and training reflect these authorities.
linked_acts: Iran Threat Reduction and Syria Human Rights Act
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Authorizes implementation of statutory sanctions on Iran, including blocking property and prohibiting certain transactions. Requires robust Iran-related screening and compliance.

deduplicated_results.name: Taking Additional Steps to Address the National Emergency With Respect to Somalia
deduplicated_results.explanation: Expands sanctions related to Somalia. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this program and ensure workflows/training reflect Somalia-related restrictions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of persons contributing to Somalia instability. Requires screening for Somalia SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Prohibiting Certain Transactions With and Suspending Entry Into the United States of Foreign Sanctions Evaders With Respect to Iran and Syria
deduplicated_results.explanation: Targets foreign sanctions evaders with respect to Iran and Syria. Maersk must screen for FSE-listed parties and ensure systems promptly integrate FSE updates.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Prohibits transactions with, and suspends entry of, foreign sanctions evaders. Requires screening for FSE list in addition to SDN.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of the Government of Syria and Prohibiting Certain Transactions With Respect to Syria
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of the Syrian government and prohibits most transactions with Syria. Maersk must ensure screening systems, workflows, and training reflect these restrictions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of Syrian government, prohibits new investment and most exports/imports. Requires robust Syria-related screening and compliance.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Transnational Criminal Organizations
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of transnational criminal organizations (TCOs). Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this program and ensure workflows/training reflect TCO-related restrictions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of designated TCOs. Requires screening for TCO SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Senior Officials of the Government of Syria
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of senior Syrian officials. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this program and ensure workflows/training reflect Syria-related restrictions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of senior Syrian officials. Requires screening for Syria SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons With Respect to Human Rights Abuses in Syria
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of persons involved in human rights abuses in Syria. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this program and ensure workflows/training reflect Syria-related restrictions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of persons involved in Syria human rights abuses. Requires screening for Syria SDNs.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property and Prohibiting Certain Transactions Related to Libya
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property and prohibits certain transactions related to Libya. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this program and ensure workflows/training reflect Libya-related restrictions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of Libyan government and associates, prohibits certain transactions. Requires robust Libya-related screening and compliance.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons Contributing to the Conflict in Somalia
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes OFAC sanctions program targeting persons contributing to the conflict in Somalia. Maersk operates globally, including in high-risk regions, and must screen against SDNs designated under this EO. Relevant for screening, onboarding, and transactional compliance.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons designated for contributing to the conflict in Somalia. Requires U.S. persons (and foreign entities with U.S. touchpoints) to block assets and reject transactions involving listed parties.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Additional Persons in Connection With the National Emergency With Respect to Syria
deduplicated_results.explanation: Expands the Syria sanctions program by blocking property of additional persons. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO as part of its OFAC compliance program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with additional persons contributing to the situation in Syria. Expands the list of designated parties subject to U.S. sanctions.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Persons Undermining the Sovereignty of Lebanon or Its Democratic Processes and Institutions
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes a Lebanon-related OFAC sanctions program. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO as part of its global sanctions compliance.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons undermining Lebanon's sovereignty or democratic institutions.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons Who Threaten Stabilization Efforts in Iraq
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes Iraq-related sanctions targeting persons threatening stabilization efforts. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons threatening stabilization in Iraq.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons Contributing to the Conflict in the Democratic Republic of the Congo
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes OFAC sanctions program for the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons contributing to the conflict in the DRC.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of and Prohibiting Transactions With the Government of Sudan
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes Sudan-related OFAC sanctions, blocking property and prohibiting transactions with the Government of Sudan. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with the Government of Sudan and related entities.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Additional Persons in Connection With the National Emergency With Respect to Syria
deduplicated_results.explanation: Expands the Syria sanctions program by blocking property of additional persons. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with additional persons contributing to the situation in Syria.

deduplicated_results.name: Modifying the Protection Granted to the Development Fund for Iraq and Certain Property in Which Iraq Has an Interest and Protecting the Central Bank of Iraq
deduplicated_results.explanation: Modifies protections for the Development Fund for Iraq and the Central Bank of Iraq. Relevant for Maersk if handling Iraqi assets or transactions, but less direct than other Iraq-related EOs.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Continues protection for certain Iraqi property and the Central Bank of Iraq from attachment or legal process.

deduplicated_results.name: Termination of Emergency Declared in Executive Order 12722 With Respect to Iraq and Modification of Executive Order 13290, Executive Order 13303, and Executive Order 13315
deduplicated_results.explanation: Terminates certain Iraq-related emergencies and modifies prior Iraq EOs. Relevant for historical context and compliance with legacy blocked property, but does not create new screening obligations.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Terminates certain Iraq-related emergencies and modifies prior Iraq sanctions EOs.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of the Former Iraqi Regime, Its Senior Officials and Their Family Members, and Taking Certain Other Actions
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of the former Iraqi regime and related persons. Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO, especially for legacy assets or transactions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with former Iraqi regime officials and their families.

deduplicated_results.name: Protecting the Development Fund for Iraq and Certain Other Property in Which Iraq Has an Interest
deduplicated_results.explanation: Protects the Development Fund for Iraq and certain Iraqi property. Maersk must be aware of protections and restrictions if handling Iraqi assets or transactions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Protects certain Iraqi property from attachment and legal process; blocks property of former regime.

deduplicated_results.name: Confiscating and Vesting Certain Iraqi Property
deduplicated_results.explanation: Confiscates and vests certain Iraqi property. Relevant for Maersk if handling Iraqi assets, but less direct than other Iraq-related EOs.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Authorizes confiscation and vesting of certain Iraqi property.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Persons Who Threaten International Stabilization Efforts in the Western Balkans
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes blocking sanctions on persons threatening stabilization in the Western Balkans. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program, relevant for OFAC integration and compliance.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons designated for threatening peace in the Western Balkans. Requires screening and blocking of listed parties.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Weapons of Mass Destruction Proliferators and Their Supporters
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes the WMD Proliferators sanctions program. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this EO, directly relevant to OFAC integration and compliance.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of persons/entities involved in proliferation of WMDs and their supporters. Requires screening and blocking of designated parties.

deduplicated_results.name: Continuing Certain Restrictions With Respect to North Korea and North Korean Nationals
deduplicated_results.explanation: Continues restrictions on North Korea and North Korean nationals. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program, relevant for OFAC compliance.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Continues blocking of property and prohibitions on transactions with North Korea and its nationals.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons With Respect to Serious Human Rights Abuses by the Government of Iran and Taking Certain Other Actions
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of persons involved in serious human rights abuses by the Government of Iran. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons designated for human rights abuses in Iran.

deduplicated_results.name: Termination of Emergency With Respect to the Taliban and Amendment of Executive Order 13224 of September 23, 2001
deduplicated_results.explanation: Amends EO 13224 (Global Terrorism) and terminates emergency with respect to the Taliban. Relevant for screening if Maersk deals with Afghanistan or terrorism-related designations.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Terminates Taliban emergency, amends terrorism sanctions; impacts SDN list.

deduplicated_results.name: Reimposing Certain Sanctions With Respect to Iran
deduplicated_results.explanation: Reimposes broad sanctions on Iran, including blocking property and prohibiting transactions. Maersk must screen for SDNs and ensure compliance with Iran sanctions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property, prohibits transactions, and reimposes secondary sanctions on Iran. Requires robust screening and controls.

deduplicated_results.name: Taking Additional Steps To Address the National Emergency With Respect to Venezuela
deduplicated_results.explanation: Expands the definition of the Government of Venezuela for sanctions purposes. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Expands scope of Venezuela sanctions to include additional entities; requires screening and blocking.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking the Property and Suspending Entry Into the United States of Certain Persons With Respect to Grave Human Rights Abuses by the Governments of Iran and Syria via Information Technology
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property and suspends entry of persons involved in grave human rights abuses by Iran and Syria via IT. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of persons/entities involved in IT-enabled human rights abuses in Iran/Syria.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property and Suspending Entry of Certain Persons Contributing to the Situation in Syria
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property and suspends entry of persons contributing to the situation in Syria. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with designated persons related to Syria.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons With Respect to North Korea
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of certain persons with respect to North Korea. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with designated North Korean persons/entities.

deduplicated_results.name: Taking Additional Steps to Address the Situation in Venezuela
deduplicated_results.explanation: Imposes additional sanctions on Venezuela, including digital currency restrictions. Maersk must screen for SDNs and ensure compliance with Venezuela sanctions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Prohibits transactions involving Venezuelan digital currency and expands sanctions scope.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Additional Sanctions With Respect To North Korea
deduplicated_results.explanation: Imposes additional sanctions with respect to North Korea. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with additional North Korean persons/entities.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Sanctions on Certain Persons Destabilizing Sudan and Undermining the Goal of a Democratic Transition
deduplicated_results.explanation: Imposes sanctions on persons destabilizing Sudan. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program, relevant for operations in or near Sudan.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons designated for destabilizing Sudan.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property and Suspending Entry of Certain Persons Contributing to the Situation in Venezuela
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property and suspends entry of persons contributing to the situation in Venezuela. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with designated Venezuelan persons/entities.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Additional Persons Contributing to the Situation in Venezuela
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of additional persons contributing to the situation in Venezuela. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with additional designated Venezuelan persons/entities.

deduplicated_results.name: Executive Order 13099
deduplicated_results.explanation: Amends EO 12947 (terrorism-related sanctions). Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program if operating in relevant regions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Prohibits transactions with terrorists threatening the Middle East peace process.

deduplicated_results.name: Modernizing Sanctions To Combat Terrorism
deduplicated_results.explanation: Modernizes and expands terrorism-related sanctions. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Expands authorities to block property of terrorists and their supporters.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking the Property of Persons Involved in Serious Human Rights Abuse or Corruption
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes the Global Magnitsky sanctions program for human rights abuse and corruption. Maersk must screen for SDNs under this program.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons designated for serious human rights abuse or corruption worldwide.

deduplicated_results.name: Authorizing the Implementation of Certain Sanctions Set Forth in the Countering America's Adversaries Through Sanctions Act
deduplicated_results.explanation: Authorizes implementation of CAATSA sanctions, which are directly relevant to Maersk's US OFAC screening, especially for Russia/Ukraine exposure and secondary sanctions risk.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Authorizes and directs the implementation of certain sanctions set forth in CAATSA, including blocking property and prohibiting transactions with designated persons/entities, especially those related to Russia, Iran, and North Korea.

deduplicated_results.name: Continuation of Export Control Regulations
deduplicated_results.explanation: Continues the Export Administration Regulations (EAR) under IEEPA, which are core to Maersk's US export controls and screening obligations.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Continues the national emergency and maintains the EAR, requiring compliance with US export controls for dual-use goods, technology, and software.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Additional Persons Contributing to the Situation in Belarus
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes/expands Belarus sanctions, requiring Maersk to screen for SDNs and embargoed parties related to Belarus.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons contributing to the situation in Belarus, expanding the list of designated parties.

deduplicated_results.name: Executive Order 12959
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes core Iran sanctions, prohibiting most transactions and requiring robust screening for Iranian parties and embargoed goods.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Prohibits most trade and financial transactions with Iran, requiring screening and blocking of Iranian parties and property.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property and Prohibiting Transactions With Persons Who Commit, Threaten To Commit, or Support Terrorism
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes the Global Terrorism Sanctions program, requiring Maersk to screen for SDGTs and block property/transactions with designated terrorists.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons who commit, threaten to commit, or support terrorism; mandates screening for SDGTs.

deduplicated_results.name: Clarification of Certain Executive Orders Blocking Property and Prohibiting Certain Transactions
deduplicated_results.explanation: Clarifies and amends terrorism-related EOs, affecting the scope of SDGT screening and compliance obligations.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Clarifies the scope of blocking and prohibitions under terrorism-related EOs, ensuring comprehensive coverage of designated parties.

deduplicated_results.name: Executive Order 12981
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes procedures for export license review under the EAR, directly relevant to Maersk's export controls compliance.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Sets forth interagency process for export license applications, affecting how Maersk manages export-controlled shipments.

deduplicated_results.name: Executive Order 13067
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes Sudan sanctions, requiring screening for Sudanese government property and embargoed transactions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks Sudanese government property and prohibits most transactions with Sudan, requiring screening for Sudan-related parties.

deduplicated_results.name: Prohibiting Certain Transactions With Respect to North Korea
deduplicated_results.explanation: Expands North Korea sanctions, requiring Maersk to screen for North Korea-related parties and embargoed goods.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Prohibits direct and indirect imports/exports to/from North Korea, blocks property, and expands screening requirements.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Additional Sanctions With Respect to the Situation in Venezuela
deduplicated_results.explanation: Imposes additional Venezuela sanctions, affecting Maersk's screening for Venezuelan government and related entities.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Restricts certain financial transactions and dealings with the Government of Venezuela, requiring enhanced screening.

deduplicated_results.name: Executive Order 12058
deduplicated_results.explanation: Relates to nuclear non-proliferation; relevant for export controls but less direct for general OFAC screening unless dealing with nuclear-related goods.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Delegates functions for nuclear non-proliferation controls, relevant for shipments involving nuclear materials.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of the Government of Venezuela
deduplicated_results.explanation: Blocks property of the Government of Venezuela, requiring Maersk to screen for and block transactions with Venezuelan government entities.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks all property and interests in property of the Government of Venezuela in the US, prohibits most transactions.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Additional Persons Contributing to the Situation in Ukraine
deduplicated_results.explanation: Expands Russia/Ukraine sanctions, requiring Maersk to screen for additional designated persons/entities.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons contributing to the situation in Ukraine (Russia-related).

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons Undermining Democratic Processes or Institutions in Belarus
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes Belarus sanctions, requiring screening for designated Belarusian persons undermining democratic processes.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons undermining democratic processes in Belarus.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons and Prohibiting Certain Transactions With Respect to Continued Russian Efforts To Undermine the Sovereignty and Territorial Integrity of Ukraine
deduplicated_results.explanation: Expands Russia/Ukraine sanctions, especially for Donetsk and Luhansk regions, requiring Maersk to update screening for new embargoed territories.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons/entities in Donetsk and Luhansk, and those supporting Russian efforts in Ukraine.

deduplicated_results.name: Administration of Reformed Export Controls
deduplicated_results.explanation: Reforms and updates export controls administration, relevant for Maersk's export controls compliance and licensing processes.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Delegates authority for export controls, affecting how Maersk manages export-controlled shipments and compliance.

deduplicated_results.name: Executive Order 13059
deduplicated_results.explanation: Consolidates and clarifies Iran sanctions, requiring Maersk to maintain robust screening for Iranian parties and embargoed goods.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Prohibits most transactions with Iran, blocks property, and clarifies scope of embargo.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons and Prohibiting the Export of Certain Goods to Syria
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes Syria sanctions, requiring Maersk to screen for Syrian SDNs and embargoed goods.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of certain persons and prohibits export of certain goods to Syria.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Sanctions With Respect to the Iron, Steel, Aluminum, and Copper Sectors of Iran
deduplicated_results.explanation: Imposes sectoral sanctions on Iran's metals industry, requiring Maersk to screen for and block transactions involving Iranian iron, steel, aluminum, and copper sectors.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons operating in Iran's iron, steel, aluminum, and copper sectors.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Persons Threatening the Peace, Security, or Stability of Yemen
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes Yemen sanctions, requiring screening for designated persons threatening Yemen's peace and stability.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons threatening the peace, security, or stability of Yemen.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons With Respect to South Sudan
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes South Sudan sanctions, requiring screening for designated persons related to South Sudan.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons contributing to conflict in South Sudan.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Certain Persons Contributing to the Situation in Ukraine
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes initial Russia/Ukraine sanctions, requiring Maersk to screen for designated persons/entities contributing to the situation in Ukraine.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with persons contributing to the situation in Ukraine.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of Additional Persons Contributing to the Situation in Ukraine
deduplicated_results.explanation: Expands Russia/Ukraine sanctions, including sectoral sanctions, requiring Maersk to update screening for new SDNs and sectoral lists.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property and prohibits transactions with additional persons/entities contributing to the situation in Ukraine, including sectoral sanctions.

deduplicated_results.name: Prohibiting Certain Additional Transactions With Respect to Venezuela
deduplicated_results.explanation: Prohibits additional transactions with Venezuela, requiring Maersk to screen for new types of restricted transactions and parties.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Prohibits certain additional transactions with the Government of Venezuela, including debt and equity restrictions.

deduplicated_results.name: Executive Order 13020
deduplicated_results.explanation: Amends EO 12981 regarding export controls, relevant for Maersk's export licensing and compliance processes.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Amends procedures for export license review and interagency process under the EAR.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking the Property of Certain Persons Engaging in Significant Malicious Cyber-Enabled Activities
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes cyber-related sanctions; Maersk must screen for SDNs designated under this EO, but direct operational impact is limited unless Maersk deals with cyber actors or is exposed to cyber-related SDNs.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of persons engaged in significant malicious cyber-enabled activities; prohibits transactions with designated persons; requires screening for SDNs under this program.

deduplicated_results.name: Blocking Property of the Government of North Korea and the Workers' Party of Korea, and Prohibiting Certain Transactions With Respect to North Korea
deduplicated_results.explanation: Establishes comprehensive North Korea sanctions; Maersk must screen all parties and transactions for North Korea-related restrictions, which is highly relevant to global shipping and logistics.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Blocks property of the Government of North Korea and the Workers' Party of Korea; prohibits most transactions with North Korea; mandates screening and controls for North Korea-related parties and activities.

deduplicated_results.name: Imposing Additional Sanctions With Respect to North Korea
deduplicated_results.explanation: Expands North Korea sanctions, including secondary sanctions on non-U.S. persons; Maersk must ensure screening systems and workflows capture these expanded restrictions.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Imposes additional sanctions on North Korea, including secondary sanctions on foreign financial institutions and shipping; prohibits certain trade, port calls, and services.

deduplicated_results.name: Executive Order 12957
deduplicated_results.explanation: Foundational Iran EO; prohibits certain transactions with respect to Iranian petroleum resources. Maersk must screen for and block prohibited Iran-related activities, especially in shipping/logistics.
deduplicated_results.key_provisions: Prohibits U.S. persons from entering into contracts for the development of Iranian petroleum resources; forms the basis for broader Iran sanctions.

deduplicated_results.name: Taking Additional Steps With Respect to the Situation in Syria
